texto: I thought that there could be no revolt against nature. I accepted the landscape without dreaming that, behind, there still prowled large skeletons without fur. With just one sign, I thought I was able to make them rise up outside their refuges...
explicacao: Citação de Roger Vitrac sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I thought that there could be no revolt against nature. I accepted the landscape without dreaming…” articula motivacao, landscape, nature em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como nature e spooky.
